name: Cash Cow
description_short: Cash Cow offers same-day title loans and payday loans up to $1,400 in New Orleans, accepting all credit scores with no credit check required.
description_long:
Cash Cow has operated as a title and payday lender in the New Orleans area for 30 years, establishing itself as a familiar name in the local emergency lending market. The company specializes in fast-access loans secured by vehicle titles, positioning itself as an alternative to traditional credit products for residents facing unexpected expenses. They advertise same-day funding up to $1,400, with a streamlined application process that begins online and concludes at their physical Gentilly Boulevard location. The company emphasizes accessibility by accepting borrowers regardless of credit history and allowing customers to retain vehicle use during the loan period.

Cash Cow's core service offering centers on title loans and payday loans with same-day or next-day cash delivery. Their process involves an online application submission, a follow-up call from a representative, an in-person visit to the New Orleans location for vehicle inspection and document completion, and same-day cash disbursement. The company advertises no credit score requirements and positions loans up to $1,400 as accessible to all borrowers. They maintain a single confirmed location at 3147 Gentilly Boulevard with stated hours Monday-Friday 10AM-6PM and Saturday 9AM-1PM.

Cash Cow differentiates itself through its three-decade operational history in the local market and claims of streamlined efficiency. The company emphasizes community familiarity, customer-focused service, and the ability to keep your vehicle while repaying. The physical store location is marketed with local landmarks (Capital One Bank, Radio Shack nearby; Anytime Fitness and Burger Orleans across nearby streets) to establish community presence and convenience. They position rapid approval and funding as core competitive advantages.

As a title lender offering high-cost emergency credit, Cash Cow serves borrowers with urgent cash needs but limited access to mainstream credit products. The business model inherently involves short-term debt at rates typical of the title loan industry, which historically carry APRs well exceeding 100% and create renewal/rollover debt cycles. While the website does not disclose specific APR, term lengths, or renewal policies, the product category and promotional language ("same-day cash regardless of credit history") indicate high-cost lending. This is an appropriate emergency access tool for specific situations but carries significant financial risk if misused or rolled over repeatedly.
address: 3037 S Carrollton Ave, New Orleans, LA 70118

company_info.headquarters: 3037 S Carrollton Ave, New Orleans, LA 70118

pros: Same-day funding available with loans up to $1,400
No credit score requirement or credit check mentioned
Borrowers can retain and use their vehicle while repaying the loan
30 years of operational history in the New Orleans area
Simple online application process with follow-up support from representatives
Physical location with stated hours and local landmarks for easy identification
Accepts all credit profiles including those with poor or no credit history
cons: Website does not disclose APR, interest rates, or fee structure, typical of high-cost title lending
No information about loan term length, repayment options, or consequences of missed payments
Title loans create risk of vehicle repossession if payments are missed
Industry-standard high-cost lending model often leads to rollover debt cycles and repeat borrowing
Single confirmed location limits accessibility for broader New Orleans metro area residents
best_for: Borrowers with urgent cash needs and poor or no credit history who cannot qualify for personal loans
Vehicle owners facing unexpected expenses and needing same-day funds
Residents in the New Orleans area with reliable transportation who can visit the Gentilly Boulevard location
diagnosis: Cash Cow is best for New Orleans-area vehicle owners with poor or no credit history who need emergency cash within hours and cannot access traditional personal loans or credit products. The critical caveat is that title loans are high-cost debt instruments with rates and terms not disclosed on this website; borrowers should verify APR and renewal policies before committing, as title lending frequently results in expensive debt cycles and vehicle loss risk.
services: Phone consultation and application support from representatives
Loans available regardless of credit score or history
Vehicle retention during loan repayment period
Local financing solutions tailored to New Orleans community
